creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
hi Andrey

Elixir 1.16.2 is already available as lang/elixir-devel (if you run /latest/ 
ports branch, not /quarterly/ ).

lang/elixir has been blocked on an upgrade of RabbitMQ PR#275838 to allow it
to move forwards. I expect lang/elixir to move to 1.16.2 in the next
fortnight, assuming there are no other dependent ports blocking this.

NB elixir > 1.16.0 will require OTP26, which will become the main erlang
version in the ports tree during 2024.

Closing this atm as the newer release is already available under the -devel
version.
